# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    A = list(map(int, data[1:]))

    first = second = -1
    index_first = index_second = -1

    for i in range(N):
        if A[i] > first:
            second = first
            index_second = index_first
            first = A[i]
            index_first = i
        elif A[i] > second:
            second = A[i]
            index_second = i

    print(index_second + 1)  # Convert to 1-based index

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
